_comment: Shona Wordle wordlist. 'answers' is the rotating daily pool (every entry MUST be a real, commonly-used Shona word verified by a Shona speaker). 'valid' is the larger pool a player may TYPE without being told it isn't a word; it includes everything in 'answers' plus more. 'meanings' maps each answer word to a short English gloss shown at end of game. Both lists are exactly 6 ASCII a-z letters. Digraphs (nh, mh, vh, sv, dz, bv) are treated as their component letters per Wordle convention.
_curator_notes: MVP starter pool May 2026. Pool extended May 2026 from English-Shona top-3500 dictionary (OpenTran) + Shona Wikipedia article corpus (snwiki dump, ~19k articles, 6-letter tokens with freq>=3 after English / template-noise / low-entropy filtering). Auto-mined entries in 'valid' are not individually meaning-glossed; they exist so the game accepts real Shona words a player might type. 'answers' (daily rotation) and 'meanings' remain newsroom-curated. Bug reports and additions: news@mutapatimes.com.
